testcase.name: test_create_workflow_with_specialties
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_workflow_targeting.py:164: in test_create_workflow_with_specialties assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create workflow: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create workflow: {"detail":"Permission denied"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
